payload.author: agent
payload.body:
CI half validated — full ci.yml dry-run is green locally after this session's work.

Verified end-to-end: fmt --check (caught + fixed rustfmt drift in the stage-0 crates, commit 27ad26c), clippy --workspace -D warnings, test --workspace (24 test binaries, 0 failed), gen-docs --check, check-emissions (18 rules), gen-std-signatures --check, release dogfood build (libs via release wrapper), the RUSTDOC doc-test gate (negative fails / positive passes), all 10 lint-fail fixtures firing their rule (incl. new R0017), strict-clean, and hello/pipe/named-args build+run. Plus the RT-66/70/71 wrapper+CLI demos.

CI is launch-ready. REMAINING (ops, user action): make the GitHub repo public and confirm Actions is enabled so the workflow actually runs on push/PR. Leaving RT-57 in_progress until that's done.
